---
title: "Investigating the Association between Census Demographics and Hosting Capactiy"
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}
census <- read_csv(here("~/../../capstone/electrigrid/data/socioeconomic-census/census_data.csv"))
# census2 <- read_csv(here("~/../../capstone/electrigrid/data/census-pop-data/pop_census_tidy.csv"))
census_vars <- read_csv(here("~/../../capstone/electrigrid/data/census-pop-data/var20.csv"))
```

```{r}
census_race <- census |> 
    select(geoid, name, starts_with('estimate_total_sex_by_age')) |> 
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with('estimate_total_sex_by_age'), names_prefix = 'estimate_total_sex_by_age_', names_to = 'race', values_to = 'estimate')
```
